caption: An aerial view showcases a cityscape with a mix of high-rise buildings and smaller structures under a cloudy sky. In the background, a line of tall skyscrapers stands against the horizon, while lower-density residential and commercial areas fill the foreground. Greenery and trees are interspersed among the buildings and streets. A watermark reading "TIGER REAL ESTATE LLC" is visible in the lower right portion of the scene. As the video progresses, the camera pans smoothly from left to right, shifting the perspective of the city skyline and revealing more of the urban landscape to the right. No people or active movements are discernible from this distance, and the overall lighting remains consistent throughout the sequence, capturing a static urban environment from a moving aerial vantage point.
